title: VeloraOS 1.10.15 - Thinking Indicator
releaseNotes: Restores the three animated thinking dots while VeloraOS is generating a Chat response.
Shows the thinking indicator immediately after sending and when reconnecting to an active background Chat job.
Removes the indicator automatically on completion, failure or cancellation.
Preserves the Chat stability fix so background polling does not cause viewport jumping.
Preserves model profiles, Automatic routing, background jobs, HTTPS, PWA support and secure rollback updates.
